subcodes.first_line: O Báqir! Thy letter hath reached Us, and thou didst seek vision from the Truth. There is no doubt that the Truth, exalted be His glory, is powerful and mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا باقر نامه ات رسید و از حق بصر خواستی شکی نیست که حق جل جلاله قادر و مقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
